title: Join the monday Reddit hackathon! 1st place wins $1,000!

posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Winners announcement design reddit1920×1080 131 KB

If you’re a monday pro, this one’s for you.

We’re hosting a community hackathon exclusively on our Reddit, and the top submission will take home $1,000.

The idea is simple:
Pick one manual, repetitive task from your day-to-day work and build a monday-based solution that makes it smoother, smarter, or fully automated (maybe you already have one!)

It can be a board, an automation flow, an app built with vibe, anything that helps simplify your day.

You’ll have one week to share your idea directly in r/mondaydotcom, and we’ll be awarding prizes to the top three entries:
1st place: $1,000
2nd place: $700
3rd place: $500

If you want to join, all the details are here!

See you on Reddit!
